CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7)) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2021-04-02"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2021-04-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-08-01"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-08-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-09-05"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-09-05")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-09-30"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-09-30")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-10-10"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-10-10")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-11-11"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-11-11")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-12-26"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-12-26")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-12-27"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-12-27")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-01-02"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-01-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-02-20"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-02-20")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-04-07"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-04-07")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-04-10"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-04-10")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-05-22"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-05-22")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-07-03"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-07-03")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-08-07"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-08-07")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-09-04"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-09-04")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-10-02"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-10-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-10-09"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-10-09")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-11-13"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-11-13")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-12-25"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-12-25")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Sent_For_Owner_Review_Date_Updated__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-12-26"), DATEVALUE(Accounts_Validation_Date__c) > DATEVALUE("2023-12-26")),1,0)
CustomField.label: SLA - Validation of Accounts
